calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, #13286.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Wes Flowers, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant John Riojas.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 30, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---The Coast Lease Agreement dated 7/20/07---------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Six Photographs of Defendant's possessions, undated.--------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Notice of Termination of Tenancy dated 6/27/08--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Proof of Service of Legal Notice on Tenant dated 7/01/08----------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Stewasrt Company, and against defendant John Riojas as follows:

Plaintiff John Stewart Company shall recover from defendant John Riojas Holdover Damages in the amount of 561.80 and costs in the amount of 265.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $826.80.

Plaintiff John Stewart Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 516 O'Farrell Street, #627, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Continued To Aug-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Off Calendar
